input_init: h_in0[i] = static_cast<float>(i % 11) - 5.0f; h_in1[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 3) % 13) - 6.0f; h_in2[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 7) % 17) - 8.0f; h_in3[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 11) % 19) - 9.0f;
element_op_code: ascend::std::quad_fanout(in0_val, in1_val, in2_val, in3_val, out0_val, out1_val, out2_val, out3_val, out4_val);
golden_code: expected0 = in0_ref + in1_ref; expected1 = in1_ref + in2_ref; expected2 = in2_ref + in3_ref; expected3 = in0_ref - in3_ref; expected4 = in0_ref + in1_ref + in2_ref + in3_ref;
